headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .208 / .387 / .333.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the Seattle Mariners, KC 0, SEA 2. Noah Cameron led the night, working 6.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 8 strikeouts and 2 walks. Salvador Perez supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.0 mph.

player_of_game.name: Noah Cameron
player_of_game.reason: worked 6.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 8 strikeouts and 2 walks.
